summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the multi-page Dulce Café (react-router-dom v7). Tested routing (desktop nav, direct URL load, unknown route fallback), scroll reset, Menu page (catalog + tabs + prices + WhatsApp links + custom-cake 'from' price), Home featured (6 items + view-all), Nosotros page, Visitanos page (map iframe + Google/Waze directions + 7-day hours + WhatsApp), Mobile tab bar visibility rules, mobile no-overflow on all 4 routes, language toggle persistence + per-page <title>, 3D canvas, and overall error state. All 13 review checkpoints pass. Zero page errors, zero console errors, zero broken images.
action_items: INFO ONLY (not a bug): Review request states the /menu page should show 14 menu-item-* cards under 'All', but MENU_ITEMS in /app/frontend/src/data/menu.js actually contains 15 items (panaderia=4, pasteleria=5, salados=3, cafe=3). Filtering works correctly for each category. Either the data array or the review note is off-by-one; current implementation is internally consistent.

INFO ONLY: floating-whatsapp uses framer-motion with a 1.2s delay + spring animation; tests that probe visibility within <2s after navigation get a false negative. Functional behavior is correct (visible on desktop ≥lg, hidden on mobile).
critical_code_review_comments: MenuPage.jsx uses AnimatePresence mode='popLayout' — during category switch the exiting cards remain in the DOM for ~400ms. Tests using querySelectorAll right after a tab click can see counts like 15 transiently. Suggest adding a small wait (>=500ms) in any future automation, or expose data-testid='menu-item-list-current' that reflects only the active set.
WhatsAppButton has a 1.2s transition delay; consider lowering or adding a data-state attribute for faster automated assertions.
No backend present — confirmed pure static frontend, no API calls, no .env API keys used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-page site validated. When asserting menu item counts on /menu after tab clicks, wait >=1500ms because AnimatePresence keeps exiting cards mounted. floating-whatsapp animation has a 1.2s delay — wait >=2.5s before is_visible check. Hours list on Visitanos is a <ul><li>×7> (NOT a <table>) — DAY_KEYS from /app/frontend/src/data/menu.js. All wa.me links use the number 50767453546. Map is a Google /maps/embed iframe with data-testid='visitanos-map'.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. The only observation worth noting is the 14-vs-15 menu item count discrepancy between the review request and the actual MENU_ITEMS array; both filtering and 'All' view operate correctly against whichever count the data file holds.
